# Data Stewardship Checklist

**Owner:** Data Steward  
**Related roles:** [Roles & Personas](../octoacme-roles-and-personas.md)

## Purpose
Ensure project data is correctly classified, access-controlled, retained appropriately, and documented in compliance with organizational and regulatory requirements.

---

## Project / Dataset Information

- **Project name:**
- **Dataset / data asset:**
- **Data Steward:**
- **Engineering Lead:**
- **Date of review:**

---

## Data Classification

- [ ] Data classified according to organizational policy (e.g., Public, Internal, Confidential, Restricted)
- [ ] Classification documented and accessible to relevant team members
- [ ] Handling requirements for each classification level confirmed and communicated

## Access Control

- [ ] Access permissions defined (who can read, write, delete)
- [ ] Access provisioned using least-privilege principle
- [ ] Access list reviewed with Engineering Lead and Project Manager
- [ ] Offboarding procedure confirmed (access revoked when team members leave)

## Data Documentation

- [ ] Data sources and lineage documented
- [ ] Data dictionary / schema documented and up to date
- [ ] Known data quality issues logged and assigned for resolution
- [ ] Data dependencies identified and shared with relevant teams

## Retention & Disposal

- [ ] Retention period defined per policy or regulatory requirement
- [ ] Automated retention / deletion configured where applicable
- [ ] Disposal procedure documented and confirmed with legal/compliance (if required)

## Compliance & Legal

- [ ] Applicable regulations identified (e.g., GDPR, CCPA, HIPAA)
- [ ] Data Processing Agreement (DPA) in place if sharing with third parties
- [ ] Privacy Impact Assessment (PIA) completed if required
- [ ] Legal / compliance sign-off obtained

## Incident Response

- [ ] Data breach response procedure known and documented
- [ ] Data Steward contact included in incident response runbook
- [ ] Reporting obligations confirmed (e.g., regulatory notification timelines)

---

## Periodic Review

- [ ] Data classification and access reviewed quarterly (or as policy requires)
- [ ] Data documentation updated after each significant project change
- [ ] Audit log reviewed for anomalous access patterns
